name: PatientState
what_it_solves: Layer-0 Pydantic/dataclass contract carried by every engine boundary that references PatientState.
how_it_solves: Fields (canonical set): ['somatic_mutations', 'germline_variants', 'tumor_type', 'biomarkers', 'prior_therapies']. See CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP.txt Ch 3.2 for the exact schema.
why_it_exists: Single source of truth for patient input. Everything downstream reads from PatientState so no engine forages raw EHR fields.
